title: schizachyrium fragile var. luzoniense
intro: Schizachyrium fragile var. luzoniense, also known as Luzon little bluestem, is a type of grass native to the Philippines. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Luzon little bluestem include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and supporting the immune system. It is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment.
